title: Protein renaturation from pellet samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8egcc","text":"After cell lysis and centrifugation the possibly misfolded proteins can be refolded with this protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Resuspend the samples in 50 mM Tris-HCl at pH 7.4, 4 M urea
Sonicate samples for four minutes, 5 sec on, 5 sec off, at 30 % Amp to wash
Repeat the washing three times, collect supernatant
Incubate the supernatant at 37 °C for minimum 1 hour
If your sample is cloudy after this add 8 M urea until it becomes clear, incubate for 1 h at 37 °C
Dialyze your denaturated protein samples first at a 1:10 ratio against buffer containing 10 % v/v glycerol and 0.1 mM EDTA (refolding buffer), 20 mM HEPES pH 7.4 at 4 °C for 4 h
Second dialysis with a 1:100 ratio against the same buffer at 4 °C for 16 h or O/N
creator: Snehadri Sinha
